rows.name: Nigel Dearden
rows.title: The Architect
rows.notes: Ir. Nigel T. Dearden, CEng, C.WEM, RPE (CSB), MICE, MHKIE. Chartered civil and structural engineer, chartered water and environmental manager. 36 years practice (1989-2026). Hong Kong based 33 years (1993-2026). Creator of Infrastructure Academy and The Reality Engine.

rows.name: Jonathan Green
rows.title: The Inspector
rows.notes: External inspector who provided critical UX/UI feedback on the TRE platform. Identified engagement layer improvements and interaction quality issues. Feedback led to the JG Inspector Enhancement Sprint. Node number provisional — awaiting formal assignment by Node 000.

rows.name: Henry Leong
rows.title: Network Architect — Dinosaurs to AI
rows.notes: Network Architect. First H-Tetra across 3 groups. Also in: Projections Into the Future / Infra:infrastructure-academy. Uncle of Khanh Huynh (Node 018).

rows.name: Khanh Huynh
rows.title: Marketing Intelligence — DCSN
rows.notes: Age 22, Sacramento CA, USA. BSc Marketing (Summa Cum Laude, Dec 2025). MSc Marketing Intelligence (Fall 2026). Co-founder micro-distillery Vietnam. Board member Young Professionals Alliance. Event marketing 7000+ attendees. Nephew of Henry Leong (Node 002). Also in: Projections Into the Future / Infra:infrastructure-academy.
